name: krea-mcp
description: Generate AI images and videos with Flux, Hailuo, Runway, Kling, Ideogram, Imagen and 20+ models

KREA_API_KEY.description: Your Krea API key from krea.ai

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using AI models like Flux, Ideogram, Imagen

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a video from text or image using AI models like Hailuo, Runway, Kling

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Check the status and results of a generation job

tools.name: upload_asset
tools.description: Upload an image or video asset for use in generations

tools.name: get_asset
tools.description: Get details of an uploaded asset

tools.name: search_styles
tools.description: Search for available styles and LoRAs

tools.name: get_style
tools.description: Get details of a specific style
